title: SellXP
body:
# SellXP

 Sell Your XP for Money in Minecraft

## Description
SellXP is a simple and powerful plugin that allows players to exchange their XP points or levels for in-game currency. Fully compatible with Vault and popular economy plugins, SellXP supports:

- Selling individual XP points or full levels

- Selling all XP or all levels at once

- Per-permission multipliers for VIPs or donators

- Configurable max sell limits

- Cooldowns to prevent spamming

- Customizable messages with placeholders like %player%, %levels%, %money%, and %multiplier%

- Easy-to-use commands: /sellxp <amount|amountL|all>, /sellxp reload, /sellxp help

Make your server’s economy more interactive and give players a way to turn their hard-earned XP into in-game currency!
